summary: Iteration 17 - Testing Document Preview (Anteprima) Feature. The new inline document preview functionality is fully working for PDF, images, and text files. Backend endpoint GET /api/documents/{doc_id}/preview?token=xxx correctly returns files with Content-Disposition: inline. Frontend DocumentPreview component opens a modal with embedded PDF viewer, fullscreen toggle, and download button.

issues: Minor React warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - non-blocking accessibility improvement

passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/documents/{doc_id}/preview - Returns Content-Disposition: inline (for preview, not download)
✅ GET /api/documents/{doc_id}/preview - Returns correct Content-Type: application/pdf for PDFs
✅ GET /api/documents/{doc_id}/preview - Returns binary file content with correct PDF magic bytes
✅ Admin can preview any document via API
✅ Frontend: Preview button (Eye icon) visible in ClientDetail.jsx document list
✅ Frontend: DocumentPreview modal opens on click
✅ Frontend: Modal displays filename and file type
✅ Frontend: Download button (Scarica) visible in modal
✅ Frontend: iframe src contains /preview URL with token parameter
✅ Frontend: Text file content displays correctly in preview
critical_code_review_comments: Document preview endpoint correctly accepts token as query parameter (required for iframe embedding)
Preview supports PDF, images (jpg, jpeg, png, gif, webp), and text files
Content-Disposition header correctly set to 'inline' for browser viewing instead of download
Cache-Control header set to 'private, max-age=3600' for performance
DocumentPreview.jsx component handles loading states and error states gracefully
Fullscreen toggle and download buttons properly integrated in modal
seed_data_creation: Created test document (test_preview.txt) for client FRANCESCO JUNIOR DE LISO to test preview functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: Document preview feature is fully implemented and working. Test document ID: fd335269-bd55-421a-b7dd-461d25923e31 (PDF) and 65528dde-6f6b-4fa6-a3db-7d1ae8a7077b (TXT). The preview button (Eye icon) appears in document lists in both ClientDetail.jsx (admin view) and ClientDashboard.jsx (client view). Preview uses iframe with token as query parameter for authentication.

preview_endpoint.description: GET /api/documents/{doc_id}/preview?token=xxx returns file inline with correct Content-Type

preview_button_admin.description: Eye icon button in ClientDetail.jsx opens DocumentPreview modal

preview_button_client.description: Eye icon button available in ClientDashboard.jsx document list

preview_modal_features.description: Modal includes fullscreen toggle (Maximize2/Minimize2), download button, and close button

pdf_preview.description: PDF files embedded via iframe with browser's native PDF viewer

text_preview.description: Text files displayed in iframe with text/plain content type

image_preview.description: Image files displayed via img tag with max-width/max-height constraints
